title: prob

messages.description: random number based on prob function
when we reach a number for which there is no rule

methods.description: <1> enables saving the matrix with the patch, <0> disables
sets a value for when reaching a number with no rule

body: [prob] outputs a weighted series of random numbers (1st order markov chain). It accepts lists of 3 numbers where the 3rd represents the weight/chance of going from value 1 to value 2, a bang will force [prob] to output. See below:
